_comment: Manual macro inputs (Bradley-entered). ISM licensing prohibits derivative feeds and no compliant free API exists, so ISM is a hand-baked input updated on the release day (mfg: 1st business day; svcs: 3rd business day). Update with: python update_ism.py <value> <YYYY-MM> [--svcs <value>]. The bake prefers whichever of {this file, manual_macro.json (grounded Gemini fetch)} has the fresher period, per component.
